textByHash.3eb22e91dea86d8c1c7d34386b56fb8c0ac54fc8: The test subjects are still alive, director. They will suffice as soldiers.
textByHash.46762712f754cabc57daa7a5f986a8f1fd7b05d4: Look, here comes the first group!
textByHash.803a78320016552e3081df07a66c153d424fece3: Ha, the spell has worked its magic again.
textByHash.e7921d64595c9da498bb491f5ba78ae974074f5e: No one will believe that drunken fool now!
